articles.author: Roland Hutchinson
articles.title: The Crease is Finally Gone: Samsung’s New ‘Dual-Layer’ Glass Tech for the Galaxy Z Fold 8 - Geeky Gadgets
articles.description: Samsung is finally fixing the crease. Explore the leaked Galaxy Z Fold 8 redesign, featuring a wider aspect ratio and a 5,000mAh battery.
articles.content: Samsung is poised to make a significant impact on the foldable phone market with the Galaxy Z Fold 8, addressing one of the most persistent challenges in foldable displays: the visible crease. By usi… [+5524 chars]
